title: From MCP to Scale: Pipelines That Build Themselves — Rafael Levi, Bright Data
summary: Bright Data offers an MCP (Model Context Protocol) implementation, APIs, and browser infrastructure that enable agents to inspect websites, generate production scrapers, and automatically repair broken data collection pipelines. The approach reduces manual maintenance and token costs by switching from page parsing to reusable scripts.
